scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace apps/api & npm run dev --workspace apps/web
scripts.build: npm run contracts:check && npm run build --workspace apps/api && npm run build --workspace apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace apps/api && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/web
scripts.test: npm run contracts:test && npm run test --workspace apps/api && npm run test --workspace apps/web
